title: PB-148 VERIFIED: Runtime Extraction Reduction Plan
scope: Reduction planning only for PB-147 runtime extraction candidates. No merge, deletion, push, runtime mutation, external API call, credential creation, or production activation authorized.

summary.reduction_strategy: Reduce 83 extraction candidates into sequenced capability waves; extract only minimal runtime deltas into new scoped governance/* branches after explicit approval.

reduction_principles: Do not merge backlog branches directly.
Extract runtime files separately from governance evidence, docs, recovery assets, and historical commits.
Prefer least-privilege scoped governance/* extraction branches.
Require focused tests plus full-suite evidence before merge claims.

execution_waves.name: wave_1_runtime_core
execution_waves.objective: Extract the minimum runtime governance core first so downstream branches have a stable enforcement base.
exit_criteria: new scoped governance/* extraction branch created by explicit request

execution_waves.name: wave_2_evidence_integrity
execution_waves.objective: Consolidate evidence signature, timestamp, archive, and trust-chain candidates into a coherent evidence-chain delta.
exit_criteria: new scoped governance/* extraction branch created by explicit request

execution_waves.name: wave_3_provider_intake
execution_waves.objective: Extract provider/intake gateway deltas that directly support runtime evidence collection.
exit_criteria: new scoped governance/* extraction branch created by explicit request

execution_waves.name: wave_4_euria_runtime
execution_waves.objective: Extract only Euria runtime API/test deltas; defer demo/docs and already-main overlap.
exit_criteria: new scoped governance/* extraction branch created by explicit request

execution_waves.name: wave_5_branch_release_hygiene
execution_waves.objective: Reconcile branch hygiene/release governance branches against PB-029 through PB-037 before any extraction.
exit_criteria: new scoped governance/* extraction branch created by explicit request

execution_waves.name: wave_6_deferred_orchestration
execution_waves.objective: Defer lower-priority connector, deployment, commercial, and content branches until runtime core and evidence-chain deltas are clean.
exit_criteria: new scoped governance/* extraction branch created by explicit request

execution_waves.name: blocked_hold
execution_waves.objective: Hold blocked branches fail-closed until validation gaps close.
exit_criteria: new scoped governance/* extraction branch created by explicit request
